changes: allowed_categories: ['SC', 'ST', 'OBC', 'EWS', 'BPL'] → ['Below Poverty Line (BPL)', 'Economically Weaker Section (EWS)', 'Other Backward Classes (OBC)', 'Scheduled Caste (SC)', 'Scheduled Tribe (ST)']
required_documents: ['Aadhaar card', 'Ration card', 'SECC registration proof'] → ['Aadhaar Card', 'Ration Card', 'SECC 2011 Registration Proof']

normalized_data.description: Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY) provides health coverage to economically vulnerable families.
normalized_data.benefit: Cashless treatment up to Rs. 5 lakh per year
normalized_data.application_process: Visit nearest Ayushman Mitra at empanelled hospital with Aadhaar card.
